title: Badge: Consumer Protector
resultSuccessText: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} challenges correct! You're a true Consumer Protector!
resultSuccessLesson: Lesson: Being aware of consumer rights and fraud risks helps you protect your hard-earned money.
resultFailText: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} challenges correct. Learn more about consumer safety!
resultFailTip: Tip: Never share sensitive details like OTP or bank info, and always report suspicious links and calls!

challenges.title: Fraud Case 1
challenges.question: You receive a fake call asking for bank details. What do you do?

challenges.title: Fraud Case 2
challenges.question: You get a suspicious message with a link. What's your action?

challenges.title: Fraud Case 3
challenges.question: Someone asks for your OTP. How do you respond?

challenges.question: You get a defective product. What should you do?
